parsing_res_list.block_content:
Universiti Tunku Abdul Rahman
Form Title : APPLICATION FOR STATEMENT OF RESULTS / ACADEMIC TRANSCRIPT
Form Number : FM-DEAS-024Rev No : 7Effective Date: 21/08/2023Page No : 1 of 1
1. A charge of RM 20.00 per copy is payable for the following examination results documents requested by students:
(a) Academic Transcript (A copy of Academic Transcript is issued for free after graduation)
(b) Statement of Results
2. Examination results documents may be collected personally or despatched by courier upon request. Where courier despatch is requested, the following courier charges are payable:
(a) Domestic destination (Within Malaysia): RM 30.00
(b) Overseas destination (International): RM100.00
3. Payment shall be made to “Universiti Tunku Abdul Rahman” by:
(a) Cheque/ Bank draft/ Money order/ Cashier's order/ Postal Order
(b) Online bank transfer / direct depositing into the following bank account:
Account Number: 3118325015
Bank Name: Public Bank Berhad

4. Student must collect the Statement of Results / Academic Transcripts within six (6) months from the date of the request, failing which the student is required to re-apply and make the necessary payment after the stipulated period (if any).

5. Reply slip and fund transfer/deposit slip shall be mailed to: Division of Examination and Awards (DEAS), Universiti Tunku Abdul Rahman, Jalan Sungai Long, Bandar Sungai Long, Cheras 43000, Kajang, Selangor, Malaysia or emailed to:  $ \underline{\text{deas@utar.edu.my}} $
6. Please be informed that the application will be processed within three (3) working days.
REPLY SLIP – REQUEST FOR EXAMINATION RESULT DOCUMENT
